title: nepeta multibracteata var. candeliana
intro: Nepeta multibracteata var. candeliana, also known as Nepeta candeliana or Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the Himalayas and is used for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory problems. Nepeta multibracteata var. candeliana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies for promoting health and well-being.
